name: File size issues with st.file_uploader - Streamlit forum
snippet: It's a common error when the size of the file is greater than 10GB, the issue arises. You can check about the issue here.

name: st.file_uploader - Streamlit Docs
snippet: By default, uploaded files are limited to 200 MB each. You can configure this globally using the server.maxUploadSize configuration option.

name: Bypassing the 200MB size limit for multi-file uploads? - Using Streamlit
snippet: You can update the 200MB file size limit with server.maxUploadSize. The value is in MB and defaults to 200. If you have problems, let me know!

name: How to upload large files using st.file_uploader - Streamlit forum
snippet: Create a `.streamlit/config.toml` file to set the upload limit to 4.5 GB: maxUploadSize = 4500 4.4 GB file is under the 4.5 GB limit set _ ...

name: How to upload large files on Streamlit using st.file_uploader

name: file_uploader with large file results in server getting killed #9218
snippet: I am using st.file_uploader to upload ~3.5gb file into my streamlit dashboard. This however, results in the server getting killed.

name: Cap the number of files that can be uploaded via st.file_uploader?
snippet: Is there a way to limit the files that one can upload to a Streamlit app via the st.file_uploader module? eg only allow a user to upload 3 images per session?

name: Increase file upload size in streamlit - YouTube

name: How do I increase the upload limit of st.file_uploader on Streamlit
snippet: By default, files uploaded using st.file_uploader() are limited to 200MB. You can configure this using the server.maxUploadSize config option.

name: Network error when uploading files larger than 100mb
